description.value: **Benefit:** You receive a +1 dodge bonus to your Armor Class against attacks of opportunity provoked by moving through a creatureâs reach, provided the creature is of a larger size category than you and provided at least one other ally with Circling Offense is within the creatureâs reach. If a creature that youâre receiving this dodge bonus against attacks you and misses with the attack, it provokes attacks of opportunity from any of your allies who possess Circling Offense.
